title: Formation Flight final common-offset and three-phase source robustness decision
scientificQuestion: Does the arithmetic mean of the exact population-weighted boundary-source profiles over the three deterministic near-median lattice offsets follow smooth c16/c18/c20 refinement while phase-to-phase source variation remains below 5 percent?

rationale.why: The representative and second-ranked offsets remain individually mixed at source curvatures 0.88415 and 0.57541, but their direction-weighted profiles differ by only 1.02 to 1.16 percent. The final authorized candidate is required to distinguish small lattice-phase noise around a smooth mean from repeatable grid-dependent bias.
rationale.roi: One unchanged c16/c18/c20 production-TRT triplet completes the entire authorized phase set. A passing mean-and-spread decision unlocks only the already-declared c8 wider-map scout; failure stops that much larger allocation and redirects analysis to existing direction/component evidence.
rationale.solverEvolution: None. The final diagnostic changes only the common subcell translation to [0.25,0,0.5]. Collision, geometry, kinematics, force accounting, source reconstruction, cycles, phases, grids, and numerical gates remain unchanged.

selectionRule.metric: sum over c16/c18/c20 of squared sample-SD-normalized distance from each resolution's leader areal-link-density median

geometryConditioning.status: recorded context, not the primary decision metric
geometryConditioning.reason: The final offset has nearly equal c16 and c20 scalar densities, so its endpoint-normalized scalar curvature has an ill-conditioned denominator. The preregistered primary metric is therefore the direction-resolved three-offset mean population-weighted source, with individual geometry, areal-link, conditional-population, full-source, and component curvatures retained for attribution.
geometryConditioning.prohibitedInterpretation: The final offset's individual normalized curvature cannot by itself establish convergence or a defective population operator.

knownPreFinalPhaseSpread.definition: direction-weighted L1 pairwise source-profile difference divided by the direction-weighted L1 two-phase mean profile

decomposition.conditionalMomentumExchangePopulation: m_r,p(q) = (rawReflectedPopulationSum_r,p(q) + reconstructedIncomingPopulationSum_r,p(q)) / linkCount_r,p(q), with zero at zero support
decomposition.threeOffsetMeanProfile: mean_p s_r,p(q) over the three deterministic offsets, evaluated before h-linear curvature
decomposition.directionWeight: Euclidean length of each D3Q19 direction
decomposition.c18Expectation: linear interpolation of the c16 and c20 direction profiles at h18, where h = 1 / chordCells
decomposition.phaseSpread: For each grid, maximum over the three phase pairs of weightedL1(source_i - source_j) / max(weightedL1(threeOffsetMeanSource), denominatorFloor); the headline is the maximum over c16/c18/c20.

decisionRule.phaseSpreadThresholdBasis: The 5 percent bound is frozen before final-offset CFD, matches the project's established quantitative refinement scale, and is more than four times the known two-phase maximum 1.1618 percent; it is not fit to the unseen third phase.
promotionRequires: three-offset mean population-weighted-source curvature at most 0.5
maximum pairwise source-profile phase spread at most 0.05
all evidence-integrity and numerical gates pass

classifications.robustSmoothPopulationWeightedSource: mean curvature is at most 0.5 and source phase spread is at most 0.05
classifications.meanSmoothButPhaseSensitive: mean curvature is at most 0.5 but source phase spread exceeds 0.05

nextActions.robustSmoothPopulationWeightedSource: authorize only the declared c8 three-cycle wider position-phase power scout; retain source-phase spread as numerical uncertainty and require best, neutral, and worst cells to pass c12/c16 refinement before any quantitative benefit claim
nextActions.meanSmoothButPhaseSensitive: do not run the power scout; use the archived three-offset direction/component profiles to localize the phase-sensitive source contribution
nextActions.populationWeightedSourceMeanNonAsymptoti: do not run the power scout; select one c18 direction/component phase trace from the archived three-offset residual covariance
nextActions.mixedPopulationWeightedSourceMean: do not run the power scout; select one c18 direction/component phase trace from the archived three-offset residual covariance

claimBoundary: This final deterministic phase and three-offset analysis can decide whether source refinement is robust enough to authorize the already-declared coarse formation-power scout. It cannot establish formation-power convergence, quantitative formation benefit, measured-bird formation flight, a production correction, or a biological claim.
